channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pump pain, Wall Street gain: Iran war sends U.S. oil profits, stocks soaring as the big winners
item.description: The higher oil price environment may extend well into 2028 as the world refills its depleted energy reserves, analysts warned.

item.title: Middle-aged adults taking GLP-1s for obesity can save over $192K on lifetime medical costs, higher if they don't have college degrees, new study finds
item.description: The National Bureau of Economic Research paper's lead author hopes putting a dollar value on the benefits of GLP-1s will lead to better access.

item.title: The Gen Z cofounder of $1.6 billion Whop says his platform has minted over 650 millionaires—he wants to make work fun and money worries obsolete
item.description: CEO Steven Schwartz says workers enjoying their jobs is a "foreign" concept to most, but hundreds are becoming millionaires by profiting from their passions.

item.title: A quartz countertop tariff could double your kitchen renovation cost and kill 13 jobs for every one it creates
item.description: The ITC ruled that imported quartz harms domestic manufacturers, but the remedy may be worse than the problem.
